alert.description: AI Analysis: Keyword 'secure-bank-login' and top-level domain '.tk' (.tk domains have a history of being used for malicious purposes) indicate a high likelihood of a phishing attempt.

recommendations: DO NOT enter any credentials or personal info on this site.
Run a full system antivirus scan.
Change passwords for any accounts that may have been compromised.
Enable Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) on your sensitive accounts.
response.mlOutputStr: ML analysis skipped because URL is already flagged by Reputation Engine (Score: 100).
